debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2)
n : ℕ
hn : 2 ^ (n + 1) < p
i : ℕ
env : Environment (F p)
input : Var fieldPair (F p)
x y : F p
h_input : Expression.eval env input.1 = x ∧ Expression.eval env input.2 = y
assumptions : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n ∧ ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n
⊢ ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n

failed_attempts:
have hpow : 2^n < p := lt_trans (by gcongr; exact one_lt_two) hn
    have hy_val : (y + 1).val = y.val + 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
      linarith
    have hx_val : (x + 2^n).val = x.val + 2^n := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
      linarith
    have h_le : (y + 1).val ≤ (x + 2^n).val := by
      rw [hy_val, hx_val]
      have : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := by linarith
      linarith
    refine And.intro ?_ h_env.right
    rw [ZMod.val_sub_of_le h_le, hy_val, hx_val]
    have : 2 * 2^n = 2^(n+1) := by ring
    linarith
